basic_details.job_title: ABGH Delhi Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Posts
basic_details.short_information: Acharya Shree Bhikshu Hospital (ABGH Delhi) Senior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on 02 April 2026 on the official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the ABGH Delhi Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 45 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: +5 years, OBC: +3 years

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS Degree and Mark Sheets, Internship Completion Certificate, Post Graduate Degree (MD/DNB/Diploma)
qualification.details: Senior Resident (Gynae): Post Graduate Degree (MD/DNB/DIPLOMA or equivalent in concerned stream) Senior Resident (Pathology): 03 Years' Experience as Junior Resident (02 Years in Concerned Department) MBBS Degree and Mark Sheets Internship Completion Certificate DMC Registration Certificate

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ABGH Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Senior Resident posts at Acharya Shree Bhikshu Hospital is scheduled for 14th May 2026. Candidates should ensure they report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Senior Resident position at Acharya Shree Bhikshu Hospital. These vacancies are for Senior Resident (Gynae) and Senior Resident (Pathology).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: For Senior Resident (Gynae), a Post Graduate Degree (MD/DNB/DIPLOMA or equivalent) is required. For Senior Resident (Pathology), 03 years of experience as a Junior Resident (with 02 years in the concerned department) is needed. Additionally, an MBBS degree, mark sheets, and internship completion certificate are mandatory.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Senior Resident positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Resident posts is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST candidates (+5 years) and OBC candidates (+3 years).

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Senior Resident posts will receive a salary in the range of Rs. 67,700 to Rs. 2,08,700 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the ABGH Delhi Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Resident posts at Acharya Shree Bhikshu Hospital will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, DMC registration certificate, and one set of self-attested photocopies of these documents.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these Senior Resident positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these Senior Resident positions at Acharya Shree Bhikshu Hospital is Ad-hoc.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Acharya Shree Bhikshu Hospital located?
faq.answer: Acharya Shree Bhikshu Hospital is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110015.
